race.comment: NATIONAL CODE (13) resumes. She's a progressive, lightly raced mare who won two in a row last time in and has won a trial leading in. Well placed to make a bright return. HUMBLE TRADER (8) tackled a stronger race behind Concord Connie at Flemington latest and this suits much better. Gets the blinkers on to sharpen him up third-up and reunites with hot-hand hoop in Neindorf. Big threat third-up. WOLFY (4) is knocking on the door. Has been left with too much to do in his last two but has been savaging the line. If McNeil can have hi closer from a good draw, he will prove tough to hold out. VIENNA VIXEN (12) drops back to the 1200m off 60 days in-between runs and has peaks that stack right up. Not dismissing.
